title: Lumi - Player Locator
description: Lumi - Illuminate your friends, With this mod, when you right click glowstone it makes all nearby players glow, helping you easily locate friends along the way.
body:
## Lumi - Fabric V1.0.1

Lumi is a simple Fabric mod that helps you find your friends in Minecraft. When a player uses glowstone, it causes nearby friends to glow, making them easy to spot even through walls or at a distance.

Key features:

- **Friend Highlighting:** Players holding glowstone make nearby friends glow.

- **Easy Tracking:** Perfect for multiplayer worlds or servers where keeping track of teammates is important.

- **Lightweight and Simple:** No other gameplay changes—just a fast, reliable way to see your friends.
